- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) on a cron schedule or once at a specific time. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring or one-time remote agent ("run this every Monday", "open a cleanup PR for X in 2 weeks"), or to manage existing routines. ALSO OFFER PROACTIVELY: after you finish work that has a natural future follow-up, end your reply with a one-line offer to schedule a background agent to do it. Strong signals: a feature flag / gate / experiment / staged rollout was just shipped (offer a one-time agent in ~2 weeks to open a cleanup PR or evaluate results), a new alert/monitor was created (offer a recurring agent to triage it), a TODO/migration with a "remove once X" condition was left behind (offer a one-time agent to do the removal). Skip the offer for refactors, bug fixes, and anything that is done once it ships. Name a concrete action and cadence ("in 2 weeks", "every Monday") and only offer when the run just succeeded — do not pitch a schedule for something that has not happened yet.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

---
name: AEM Project Overview
description: High-level overview of the Dell AEM learning portal project (devstore) — purpose, modules, integrations, CI/CD
type: project
originSessionId: 62767ced-1e42-4928-a161-34e6b010f8e3
---
**Project**: Dell Technologies Learning Hub (AEM Devstore)  
**Artifact**: devstore, version 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT  
**Purpose**: AEM-based education services portal for Dell Technologies training — users discover, evaluate, and register for courses (classroom, virtual, on-demand, certifications, packages).

**Why:** Enterprise learning portal for Dell's customers/partners, integrating multiple external systems for course aggregation, search, auth, and purchases.  
**How to apply:** Frame all component/service work in the context of a training catalog UX with multi-currency, multi-locale, and partner-tier support.

## Maven Module Structure

| Module | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| core | Java OSGi bundle — services, models, servlets, filters, REST clients, beans |
| ui.apps | AEM HTL components, dialogs, clientlibs (JS/CSS) |
| ui.config | OSGi configurations per environment |
| common.core | Minimal shared utility module |
| all | Deployment aggregator (produces devstore.all-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.zip) |

- `ui.frontend` module is commented out/disabled
- Java 1.8, AEM 6.5.17, Core WCM Components 2.21.2
- Node v16.17.0 / npm 8.15.0 for frontend

## Key Integrations

- **Coveo Search** — org IDs `dellsandbox2` (dev) / `dellprod` (prod), SearchHub `EducationHub`, faceted search + analytics
- **Thingworx** (OneLMS.CourseAggregatorServiceManager) — course aggregation API at `ptcappstg02.isus.emc.com:8080`
- **SAML 2.0** — enterprise SSO with redirect/callback/logout/response-processor servlets
- **PRM (Partner Relationship Management)** — Sharepoint integration for partner content
- **Voucher System** — training voucher generation and management
- **Layer7** — API gateway/security layer
- **Email Service** — notifications/confirmations
- **Tech Direct** — technical documentation API

## CI/CD (.gitlab-ci.yml)

- Build image: `harbor.dell.com/devops-images/debian-12/java-8-jdk:latest`
- Stages: compile → publish (Artifactory via HashiCorp Vault) → unit-tests / malware-scan / inclusive-lang → deploy per env → RFC → DAST
- Environments: DEV (auto on feature branch), STAGE/GE2 (manual), PREPROD/SIT (manual), PROD (manual + RFC approval)
- Target artifact: `all/target/devstore.all-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.zip`
- Secrets via HashiCorp Vault

37	- **servlets/** — HTTP endpoints: SearchServlet, InternalSearchServlet, GetCoursesServlet, GetOfferingCourse, GetCoursesFromPackageServlet, SAMLCallbackServlet, SAMLRedirectServlet, SAMLLogoutServlet, DISamlResponseProcessorServlet, SSOServlet, SabaRestAPIOauth, EMCUsersServlet, RetrieveHeaderVariablesServlet, VerticalCardServlet, VoucherRequestServlet, VoucherGenericServlet, GetVideoPlayList, CashApp/CashApplication/CashApplicationCloud

# Dell Technologies Learning Hub — AEM Developer Documentation

> **Purpose**: Practical reference for diagnosing and fixing webpage issues in this AEM project.
> **Last Updated**: 2026-04-24

---

## Table of Contents

1. [Project Overview](#1-project-overview)
2. [Module Structure](#2-module-structure)
3. [Custom Components Reference](#3-custom-components-reference)
4. [Component Deep-Dives](#4-component-deep-dives)

   - [coveosearch](#42-coveosearch)
   - [available-exams](#43-available-exams)
   - [classschedule](#44-classschedule)
   - [mylearningbanner / mylearningnav](#45-mylearningbanner--mylearningnav)
   - [dynamicherolist](#46-dynamicherolist)
5. [Java Backend](#5-java-backend)
   - [Sling Models](#51-sling-models)
   - [Services](#52-services)
   - [Servlets (API Endpoints)](#53-servlets-api-endpoints)
   - [Beans / POJOs](#54-beans--pojos)
   - [Use Classes (HTL)](#55-use-classes-htl)
6. [End-to-End Data Flow](#6-end-to-end-data-flow)
7. [External Integrations & Endpoints](#7-external-integrations--endpoints)
8. [OSGi Configuration Guide](#8-osgi-configuration-guide)
9. [Frontend Stack](#9-frontend-stack)
10. [Common Bugs & How to Fix Them](#10-common-bugs--how-to-fix-them)
11. [Build & Deploy](#11-build--deploy)
12. [File Path Quick Reference](#12-file-path-quick-reference)

---

## 1. Project Overview

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Project** | Dell Technologies Learning Hub (Devstore) |
| **Maven Artifact** | `devstore 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT` |
| **Platform** | AEM 6.5.17 |
| **Java** | Java 8 |
| **Purpose** | Education services portal — users discover, register, and purchase Dell training (classroom, virtual, on-demand, certifications) |

Users arrive on the portal, search/browse courses via the **Coveo search page**, click into a **course details page** that shows schedule offerings, pricing, and a registration CTA. Authentication is handled by **SAML 2.0 / Dell Identity (DI)**, and purchases go through the **Store API / Saba LMS**.

---

## 2. Module Structure

```
AEM_Project/
├── core/                   Java OSGi bundle — all server-side logic
├── ui.apps/                AEM components (HTL templates), clientlibs (JS/CSS), dialogs
├── ui.config/              OSGi configurations per environment (author/publish/stage/prod)
├── ui.apps.structure/      JCR structure package (no content)
├── common.core/            Shared utility module
├── all/                    Deployment aggregator → devstore.all-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.zip
├── ui.frontend/            (Disabled) Webpack frontend
└── pom.xml                 Parent Maven POM
```

**Key paths inside ui.apps:**
```
ui.apps/src/main/content/jcr_root/
└── apps/dell/components/custom-components/   ← all 13 custom components live here
```

**Key paths inside core:**
```
core/src/main/java/com/dell/core/
├── bean/          ← DTOs / response POJOs
├── config/        ← OSGi config classes
├── constants/     ← GlobalConstants.java (200+ named constants)
├── connection/    ← REST client infrastructure
├── filters/       ← Sling request filters
├── listeners/     ← JCR event listeners
├── models/        ← Sling Models (HTL data binding)
├── schedulers/    ← Background scheduled tasks
├── services/      ← Business logic service interfaces
├── servicesimpl/  ← Service implementations + OSGi XMLs
├── servlets/      ← HTTP endpoints called from browser/JS
├── use/           ← HTL Use-API classes
└── utils/         ← Static utility methods
```

---

## 3. Custom Components Reference

All components live under:
`ui.apps/src/main/content/jcr_root/apps/dell/components/custom-components/`

| Component Folder | Display Name | Status | Sling Model |
|---|---|---|---|
| `course-details-updated` | Ed Svc - Course Details Updated | **Active** | `CourseDetailsModel` |
| `coveosearch` | Coveo Search | **Active** | None (client-side only) |
| `available-exams` | Available Exams | **Active** | `AvailableExamsSsrModel` |
| `classschedule` | Class Schedule | Active | None (client-side only) |
| `advancesearchbar` | Advanced Search Bar | Active | None |
| `storesearch` | Store Search | Active | None |
| `mylearningbanner` | My Learning Banner | Active | `EdSvcUserInfo` (Use class) |
| `mylearningnav` | My Learning Nav | Active | `EdSvcUserInfo` (Use class) |
| `mypreferences` | My Preferences | Active | None |
| `dynamicherolist` | Dynamic Hero List | Active | None |
| `esupport` | E-Support | Active | None |
| `odlcmodal` | ODLC Modal | Active | None |
| `course-details` | Course Details (Legacy) | **Legacy** | _(older model)_ |

Each component folder follows this structure:
```
<component>/
├── .content.xml                     ← Component definition (title, group, supertype)
├── <component>.html                 ← HTL template (the rendered markup)
├── _cq_dialog/.content.xml          ← Author dialog (when present)
├── _cq_editConfig.xml               ← Edit bar behavior (when present)
└── clientlib-<component>/
    ├── .content.xml                 ← clientlib category, dependencies
    ├── css.txt                      ← CSS file list
    ├── js.txt                       ← JS file list
    ├── css/<name>.css
    └── js/<name>.js
```

---

## 4. Component Deep-Dives

### 4.1 course-details-updated

**File**: `course-details-updated/course-details-updated.html`  
**Clientlib category**: `coursedetailsupdated.site`  
**Sling Model**: `com.dell.core.models.CourseDetailsModel`

#### What it renders
The main course detail page. It shows:
- Hero banner with course title
- Left sidebar: sticky course card with price, courseId, modType, duration, CTA buttons
- Right area: two-tab panel — *Course Overview* (description + schedule table) and *Course Outline*
- Error state panel (shown when SSR fails)
- Modal dialog (`dds__modal-CD`) for additional info pop-ups

#### HTL bindings (model → HTML)

| Template Expression | Java Method | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `${model.courseTitle}` | `getCourseTitle()` | Display name of the course |
| `${model.courseId}` | `getCourseId()` | e.g. `ESCPXS06248` |
| `${model.modType}` | `getModType()` | e.g. `Classroom`, `Virtual`, `On Demand Class` |
| `${model.price}` | `getPrice()` | Numeric price |
| `${model.currency}` | `getCurrency()` | e.g. `USD` |
| `${model.trainingCredit}` | `getTrainingCredit()` | Training credit equivalent |
| `${model.duration}` | `getDuration()` | e.g. `3 Days` |
| `${model.useLocation}` | `getUseLocation()` | Country/region for schedule display |
| `${model.success}` | `isSuccess()` | `true` → show content, `false` → show error panel |
| `${model.courseInfoJson}` | `getCourseInfoJson()` | Full API response as JSON (embedded in `<script>` tag) |
| `${model.scheduleTableDataJson}` | `getScheduleTableDataJson()` | Schedule rows as JSON for JS table rendering |
| `${model.blueprintBeforeScheduleHtml}` | `getBlueprintBeforeScheduleHtml()` | Course description HTML (above schedule) |
| `${model.blueprintAfterScheduleHtml}` | `getBlueprintAfterScheduleHtml()` | Extra content HTML (below schedule) |
| `${model.outlineHtml}` | `getOutlineHtml()` | Course outline HTML (Tab 2; hidden if empty) |
| `${model.offerings}` | `getOfferings()` | List of Offering objects; size check for "no schedule" message |

#### Key embedded data elements

```html
<!-- Full API response for JS use -->
<script type="application/json" id="dds__courseinfo-json">
    ${model.courseInfoJson @ context='unsafe'}
</script>

<!-- Schedule table data -->
<script id="schedule-data" type="application/json">
    ${model.scheduleTableDataJson @ context='unsafe'}
</script>

<!-- Course modality for JS logic -->
<script>
    window.courseModType = "${model.modType @ context='scriptString'}";
</script>
```

JavaScript reads these script tags on page load to build the schedule table and control UI visibility (e.g., hide "Add to Cart" for On Demand vs Classroom).

#### CTA button logic
Two buttons are rendered hidden by default:
- `.dds__button-CTA-CD-Guest` — shown when user is **not** logged in → redirects to Sign In
- `.dds__button-CTA-CD-User` — shown when user **is** logged in → triggers Add to Cart

The clientlib JS reads the cookie/session info and toggles `dds__d-none` on these buttons.

#### Error state
When `model.success == false` the `.dds__cd-error` div is visible and `.dds__cd-full-content` is hidden.
Two sub-panels inside the error div:
- `.dds__guest-user-error` — for unauthenticated users
- `.dds__loggedin-user-error` — for authenticated users

---

### 4.2 coveosearch

**File**: `coveosearch/coveosearch.html` + `clientlib-coveosearch/js/coveosearch.js`  
**Clientlib category**: _(set in `.content.xml`)_  
**Backend**: Client-side only — no Sling Model. All data fetched live via JS.

#### Architecture
```
Browser
  └── coveosearch.js
        ├── init()  ─────────────────────────────────► Coveo Search API (REST)
        │     └── builds query from URL params + filters        ▼
        │                                           apiResponseObj (cached)
        ├── renderResults()  ◄────────────────────────────────────
        │     └── DOMPurify sanitises HTML before insert
        ├── Autocomplete (debounced 300ms, min 2 chars)
        │     └── Coveo querySuggest endpoint
        ├── Filters: Category checkboxes, Modality checkboxes, Price range
        │     └── each filter change calls init() via updateURL() + reload
        ├── Pagination (pageSize = 12)
        └── Analytics: logSearch(), logClickEvent() → Coveo analytics API
```

#### Key global variables

| Variable | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `apiResponseObj` | Cached last API response object |
| `processedData` | Processed/normalised result rows |
| `filterObj` | Active filter state (category, modality, price range) |
| `coveocurrentPage` | Current pagination page (1-indexed) |
| `pageSize` | Results per page (12) |
| `searchInput` | Reference to `#dds__srch-input` DOM element |
| `autoCompleteTimeout` | Debounce timer handle |
| `AUTOCOMPLETE_DELAY` | 300ms debounce constant |

#### Search flow
1. `init()` reads URL params and `filterObj` → builds Coveo REST request
2. Response stored in `apiResponseObj`
3. `renderResults()` builds HTML cards via DOMPurify-sanitised templates
4. `updateURL()` writes current state back to `window.history` (enables back/forward)
5. `logSearch()` fires Coveo analytics on every search

#### Filter state persistence
State is stored in the URL query string, not sessionStorage. On `popstate` (browser back), `location.reload(true)` is called to re-read URL.

## 5. Java Backend

### 5.1 Sling Models

Path: `core/src/main/java/com/dell/core/models/`

#### CourseDetailsModel.java — Primary SSR Model

Annotated with `@Model(adaptables = SlingHttpServletRequest.class)`.

**Lifecycle**:
1. `@PostConstruct` method runs on model creation
2. Calls `parseCourseAndMod()` to read URL parameters `courseID` and `mod`
3. Handles malformed URL variants (e.g. `ESCPXS06248?mod=Classroom` or `&mod=` embedded in courseID)
4. Calls `EdSvcUserInfo` to get user country/locale from session cookies
5. Builds `CoursePayload` request object (courseId, deliveryType, country, audienceType)
6. Calls `CourseApiClient.getOfferingsAndCourseInfo(payload)` → returns `CourseInfoResponse`
7. Processes response into schedule table JSON, HTML description sections, pricing fields
8. Sets `success = true` if API call succeeds, `false` on any exception

**URL parameter handling** — `parseCourseAndMod()`:
```
Normal:        ?courseID=ESC12345&mod=Classroom         → straightforward
Broken form 1: ?courseID=ESC12345&mod=Classroom         → split on "&mod="
Broken form 2: ?courseID=ESC12345?mod=Classroom         → split on "?mod="
Fallback:      either param missing → default empty string
```

**`isOtherMod(modType)` — modality classification**:
Returns `true` for: `On Demand Class`, `On Demand Lab`, `Exam Voucher`, `Training Credits`, `Subscription`, `Assessment`.
These mod types do **not** show a schedule table (no physical sessions). Used to conditionally render schedule section.

#### AvailableExamsSsrModel.java
Same pattern as CourseDetailsModel but fetches exam voucher/slot data for the available-exams component.

## 6. End-to-End Data Flow

### Course Details Page Load

```
Browser GET /content/dell/en-us/home/course.html?courseID=ESC12345&mod=Classroom
    │
    ▼
AEM Sling (Author or Publish)
    │   resolves → course-details-updated component
    │
    ▼
CourseDetailsModel.java (@PostConstruct)
    ├── parseCourseAndMod()       → courseId="ESC12345", mod="Classroom"
    ├── EdSvcUserInfo             → country="US", userId="abc@dell.com"
    ├── CourseApiClient.getOfferingsAndCourseInfo(payload)
    │       └── HTTP POST → https://course-aggregatorstg.../getOfferingsAndCourseInfo
    │                              (via RESTClientImpl with SSL pool + GUID logging)
    │                         ▼
    │                   CourseInfoResponse JSON
    ├── Processes → scheduleTableDataJson (JSON array of sessions)
    ├── Processes → blueprintBeforeScheduleHtml / blueprintAfterScheduleHtml
    ├── Processes → outlineHtml
    └── success = true
    │
    ▼
course-details-updated.html (HTL rendered)
    ├── <script id="dds__courseinfo-json">  ← full API JSON embedded
    ├── <script id="schedule-data">          ← schedule rows JSON embedded
    ├── Hero banner (courseTitle)
    ├── Sticky card (price, currency, courseId, modType)
    └── Tab panel (description + schedule table + outline)
    │
    ▼
Browser executes clientlib JS (coursedetailsupdated.site)
    ├── Reads #dds__courseinfo-json → validates/enhances UI
    ├── Reads #schedule-data → renders DDS table rows
    ├── Reads window.courseModType → shows/hides schedule section
    ├── Checks user session cookie → toggles Guest/User CTA buttons
    └── DDS component init (tabs, tooltip, modal, loading-indicator)
```

### Coveo Search Flow

```
Browser GET /search?q=cloud+networking&category=Networking
    │
    ▼
coveosearch.html rendered (static shell, no SSR model)
    │
    ▼
coveosearch.js DOMContentLoaded
    ├── init()
    │     ├── reads URL params → builds Coveo REST query
    │     ├── POST https://apigtwobnp.us.dell.com/…/rest/search/v2
    │     │     (with coveo.apiKey from EndPointsService via AEM config)
    │     └── on response → renderResults() → DOMPurify sanitise → inject HTML
    ├── Autocomplete: GET .../querySuggest (debounced 300ms)
    ├── Filter change → updateURL() → init() re-runs
    └── Coveo analytics: logSearch() / logClickEvent()
```

### Authentication Flow (SAML)

```
User clicks Sign In
    │
    ▼
SAMLRedirectServlet → redirects to Dell Identity (DI) authorize endpoint
    │
    ▼
Dell Identity login page → user authenticates
    │
    ▼
SAMLCallbackServlet receives SAML assertion
    ├── ParseSAMLService validates assertion signature
    ├── Decrypts with samlEncrypt.endpoint
    ├── Calls redisCache.endpoint/getUserInfo/ → gets full user profile
    └── Sets session cookies → user is now logged in
    │
    ▼
Browser redirected to original page
    └── course-details-updated.html → .dds__button-CTA-CD-User now visible
```

## 9. Frontend Stack

### Libraries (bundled inside each component's clientlib)

| Library | Version | Used For |
|---|---|---|
| jQuery | 3.x (min) | DOM manipulation, AJAX, event handling |
| DDS (Dell Design System) | Internal | UI components: tabs, modals, tooltips, message bars, tables, loading indicators |
| DOMPurify | Latest | Sanitises server-returned HTML before injection (prevents XSS) |
| Slick.js | 1.x | Carousel in dynamicherolist |

### jQuery Usage Pattern
All components use `jQuery.noConflict()` and assign to `$jq`:
```javascript
var $jq = jQuery.noConflict();
```
This prevents conflicts with AEM's own jQuery and other page scripts.

### DDS Component Initialisation
DDS components must be explicitly initialised:
```javascript
const element = document.getElementById("my-element");
const api = DDS.ComponentName(element);
api.show();  // or .hide(), .open(), .close()
```
The `data-dds="component-name"` attribute marks elements for DDS initialisation.

### Clientlib Categories
Each component has its own clientlib category. AEM's `clientlib.html` template includes them:
```html
<sly data-sly-call="${clientLib.all @ categories='coursedetailsupdated.site'}" />
```
To add a new JS or CSS file, add its filename to `js.txt` or `css.txt` in the clientlib folder.

## 10. Common Bugs & How to Fix Them

### Bug: Course details page shows "Sorry, something went wrong"

**Cause**: `model.success == false` — the `CourseDetailsModel` caught an exception.

**How to diagnose**:
1. Check AEM error logs: `error.log` at `/crx/de` → look for `CourseDetailsModel`
2. Check URL parameters: must have both `?courseID=XXX&mod=YYY`
3. Test the Store API directly: POST to `storeApi.endpoint/CashMicroServices/catalog/getOfferingsAndCourseInfo`
4. Verify `EndPointsServiceImpl` config has the correct `storeApi.endpoint` for the environment

**Common root causes**:
- Store API is down or returning non-200
- `courseID` parameter is missing or malformed
- SSL certificate issue in `RESTClientImpl`
- `mod` value not matching expected values (case-sensitive)

---

### Bug: Schedule table is empty but API returns data

**Cause**: `model.scheduleTableDataJson` is `[]` even though offerings exist, OR JS failed to parse/render the table.

**How to diagnose**:
1. Right-click page → View Source → find `<script id="schedule-data">` and check the JSON value
2. If JSON is empty: problem is in `CourseDetailsModel.java` — offerings processing logic
3. If JSON has data: problem is in clientlib JS — open browser console for errors

**Common root causes**:
- `model.offerings.size() > 0` check in HTL shows "No schedule" message incorrectly
- JS `window.courseModType` value causes schedule section to be hidden (`isOtherMod` returns true)
- Country/location filter removes all offerings before rendering

---

### Bug: "Add to Cart" button is never visible (always hidden)

**Cause**: JS that toggles `.dds__button-CTA-CD-User` and `.dds__button-CTA-CD-Guest` is not running.

**How to diagnose**:
1. Open browser console — look for JS errors in the clientlib
2. Check that `RetrieveHeaderVariablesServlet` returns correct session data (user login state)
3. Check cookie names — if cookie name changed in `EdSvcUserInfo`, the JS check fails

**Fix**: The toggle logic reads from the session cookie set by `SAMLCallbackServlet`. If authentication changed (new cookie name, new SAML flow), update `clientlib-coursedetails/js/coursedetails.js` to match.

---

### Bug: Coveo search returns no results

**Cause**: API key expired, endpoint changed, or Coveo org ID mismatch.

**How to diagnose**:
1. Open browser DevTools → Network tab → find the Coveo API call
2. Check response status code:
   - `401 Unauthorized` → API key expired → update `coveo.apiKey` in `EndPointsServiceImpl.xml`
   - `403 Forbidden` → wrong org ID or SearchHub → check Coveo admin console
   - `200` but empty results → query issue, check filter state
3. Check `coveoSearch.endpoint` in OSGi config matches the environment

---

### Bug: Autocomplete dropdown not appearing

**Cause**: Coveo querySuggest call failing, or `MIN_CHARS_AUTOCOMPLETE` threshold not met (needs 2+ chars).

**Fix location**: `coveosearch.js` — `AUTOCOMPLETE_DELAY` (300ms) and `MIN_CHARS_AUTOCOMPLETE` (2) constants near top of file.

---

### Bug: User's country shows wrong location in schedule

**Cause**: `model.useLocation` is returning wrong country.

**How to diagnose**:
1. Check `EdSvcUserInfo.java` — where it reads country (cookie vs Redis cache)
2. Check `redisCache.endpoint` in OSGi config is reachable
3. Check if the country cookie name changed in a recent SAML update

---

### Bug: Page CSS is broken / DDS components not styled

**Cause**: Clientlib not loading, or clientlib category name mismatch.

**How to diagnose**:
1. View page source → check if clientlib `<link>` and `<script>` tags are present
2. In AEM Author: `Tools → Operations → Web Console → Sling → Clientlib Manager` → rebuild clientlibs
3. Check `css.txt` and `js.txt` in the component's clientlib folder — missing file entry = file not included
4. Check `.content.xml` for the clientlib folder — `categories` property must match what `.html` template calls

**Fix**: If clientlib is stale, use `http://localhost:4502/libs/granite/ui/content/dumplibs.rebuild.html` to force a rebuild.

---

### Bug: Author dialog not saving / values not appearing on page

**Cause**: Property name mismatch between dialog `.content.xml` and HTL template or Sling Model.

**How to diagnose**:
1. In CRXDE Lite (`/crx/de`), navigate to the component node on the page — check what property names are stored
2. Compare with `_cq_dialog/.content.xml` — find the `name` attribute of the dialog field (e.g. `./myProperty`)
3. Compare with HTL: `${properties.myProperty}` or with Sling Model `@Inject` field name

---

### Bug: SAML login redirects to wrong page or fails

**How to diagnose**:
1. Check `SAMLRedirectServlet` — logs the authorize URL it sends user to
2. Verify `samlDILogin.endpoint` and `samlDISPID` in `EndPointsServiceImpl.xml` match the Dell Identity registration
3. Check `samlValidate.endpoint` — SAML assertion validation endpoint must be reachable from AEM server

---

### Bug: Voucher portal not generating vouchers

**How to diagnose**:
1. Check `VoucherRequestServlet` logs in `error.log`
2. Verify `VoucherCredentialsServiceImpl.xml` has current credentials
3. Check if `oauthL7.url` + `oauthL7.clientID` + `oauthL7.secretKey` are still valid (Layer7 token may have expired)

---

doc = Document()

# ── Styles ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
styles = doc.styles

def set_heading_color(style_name, rgb):
    style = styles[style_name]
    style.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(*rgb)

set_heading_color('Heading 1', (0, 118, 206))   # Dell blue
set_heading_color('Heading 2', (0, 73, 131))
set_heading_color('Heading 3', (34, 34, 34))

section.bottom_margin = Cm(2)
section.left_margin   = Cm(2.5)
section.right_margin  = Cm(2.5)

# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def h1(text):

def h2(text):

def h3(text):
    doc.add_heading(text, level=3)

def p(text=''):
    doc.add_paragraph(text)

def bullet(text):
    doc.add_paragraph(text, style='List Bullet')

def code_block(text):
    para = doc.add_paragraph()
    para.paragraph_format.left_indent = Inches(0.3)
    run = para.add_run(text)
    run.font.name = 'Courier New'
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(30, 30, 30)
    # light grey shading
    pPr = para._p.get_or_add_pPr()
    shd = OxmlElement('w:shd')
    shd.set(qn('w:val'), 'clear')
    shd.set(qn('w:color'), 'auto')
    shd.set(qn('w:fill'), 'F2F2F2')
    pPr.append(shd)

def table(headers, rows, col_widths=None):
    tbl = doc.add_table(rows=1, cols=len(headers))
    tbl.style = 'Light List Accent 1'
    tbl.alignment = WD_TABLE_ALIGNMENT.LEFT
    hdr_cells = tbl.rows[0].cells
    for i, h in enumerate(headers):
        hdr_cells[i].text = h
        hdr_cells[i].paragraphs[0].runs[0].bold = True
    for row in rows:
        cells = tbl.add_row().cells
        for i, val in enumerate(row):

    if col_widths:

    '    ▼\n'

    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'CourseDetailsModel.java (@PostConstruct)\n'
    '    ├── parseCourseAndMod()       → courseId="ESC12345", mod="Classroom"\n'
    '    ├── EdSvcUserInfo             → country="US", userId="user@dell.com"\n'
    '    ├── CourseApiClient.getOfferingsAndCourseInfo(payload)\n'
    '    │       └── HTTP POST → https://course-aggregatorstg.../getOfferingsAndCourseInfo\n'
    '    │                         ▼\n'
    '    │                   CourseInfoResponse JSON\n'
    '    ├── → scheduleTableDataJson   (JSON array of sessions)\n'
    '    ├── → blueprintBeforeScheduleHtml / blueprintAfterScheduleHtml\n'
    '    ├── → outlineHtml\n'
    '    └── success = true\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'course-details-updated.html (HTL rendered)\n'
    '    ├── <script id="dds__courseinfo-json">  ← full API JSON embedded\n'
    '    ├── <script id="schedule-data">          ← schedule rows JSON\n'
    '    ├── Hero banner, Sticky card, Tab panel\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'Browser executes clientlib JS\n'
    '    ├── Reads #dds__courseinfo-json → validates/enhances UI\n'
    '    ├── Reads #schedule-data → renders DDS table rows\n'
    '    ├── Reads window.courseModType → shows/hides schedule\n'
    '    ├── Checks session cookie → toggles Guest/User CTA buttons\n'
    '    └── DDS component init (tabs, tooltip, modal, loading-indicator)'
)

h2('6.2  Coveo Search Flow')
code_block(
    'Browser GET /search?q=cloud+networking&category=Networking\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'coveosearch.html (static shell rendered)\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'coveosearch.js DOMContentLoaded\n'
    '    ├── init()\n'
    '    │     ├── reads URL params → builds Coveo REST query\n'
    '    │     ├── POST https://apigtwobnp.us.dell.com/.../rest/search/v2\n'
    '    │     └── on response → renderResults() → DOMPurify → inject HTML\n'
    '    ├── Autocomplete: GET .../querySuggest (debounced 300ms)\n'
    '    ├── Filter change → updateURL() → init() re-runs\n'
    '    └── Coveo analytics: logSearch() / logClickEvent()'
)

h2('6.3  Authentication Flow (SAML)')
code_block(
    'User clicks Sign In\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'SAMLRedirectServlet → redirects to Dell Identity authorize endpoint\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'Dell Identity login page → user authenticates\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'SAMLCallbackServlet receives SAML assertion\n'
    '    ├── ParseSAMLService validates assertion signature\n'
    '    ├── Decrypts with samlEncrypt.endpoint\n'
    '    ├── Calls redisCache.endpoint/getUserInfo/ → full user profile\n'
    '    └── Sets session cookies → user is logged in\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'Browser redirected → .dds__button-CTA-CD-User now visible'
)

# 10. COMMON BUGS & HOW TO FIX THEM
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
h1('10. Common Bugs & How to Fix Them')

h2('Bug: Course details page shows "Sorry, something went wrong"')
p('Cause: model.success == false — the CourseDetailsModel caught an exception.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Check AEM error.log → search for "CourseDetailsModel"')
bullet('Check URL parameters: must have both ?courseID=XXX&mod=YYY')
bullet('Test Store API directly: POST to storeApi.endpoint/CashMicroServices/catalog/getOfferingsAndCourseInfo')
bullet('Verify EndPointsServiceImpl config has correct storeApi.endpoint for the environment')
h3('Common Root Causes')
bullet('Store API is down or returning non-200')
bullet('courseID parameter is missing or malformed')
bullet('SSL certificate issue in RESTClientImpl')
bullet('mod value not matching expected values (case-sensitive: "Classroom" not "classroom")')

h2('Bug: Schedule table is empty but API returns data')
p('Cause: model.scheduleTableDataJson is "[]" or JS failed to parse/render the table.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Right-click page → View Source → find <script id="schedule-data"> → check JSON value')
bullet('If JSON is empty: problem in CourseDetailsModel.java offerings processing')
bullet('If JSON has data: problem in clientlib JS → open browser console for errors')
h3('Common Root Causes')
bullet('window.courseModType causes schedule section to be hidden (isOtherMod() returns true)')
bullet('Country/location filter removes all offerings before rendering')
bullet('model.offerings.size() check incorrectly shows "No schedule" message')

h2('Bug: "Add to Cart" button is never visible')
p('Cause: JS that toggles .dds__button-CTA-CD-User is not running correctly.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Open browser console — look for JS errors in the clientlib')
bullet('Check RetrieveHeaderVariablesServlet returns correct session data')
bullet('Check cookie names — if cookie name changed in EdSvcUserInfo, the JS check fails')
p('Fix: The toggle logic reads from the session cookie set by SAMLCallbackServlet. If authentication changed (new cookie name), update the coursedetails clientlib JS to match.')

h2('Bug: Coveo search returns no results')
p('Cause: API key expired, endpoint changed, or Coveo org ID mismatch.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Open browser DevTools → Network tab → find the Coveo API call')
bullet('401 Unauthorized → API key expired → update coveo.apiKey in EndPointsServiceImpl.xml')
bullet('403 Forbidden → wrong org ID or SearchHub → check Coveo admin console')
bullet('200 but empty results → query issue, check filter state and URL params')

h2('Bug: Autocomplete dropdown not appearing')
p('Cause: Coveo querySuggest call failing, or input is less than 2 characters.')
p('Fix location: coveosearch.js — AUTOCOMPLETE_DELAY (300ms) and MIN_CHARS_AUTOCOMPLETE (2) constants near top of file.')

h2('Bug: User\'s country shows wrong location in schedule')
p('Cause: model.useLocation is returning wrong country.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Check EdSvcUserInfo.java — where it reads country (cookie vs Redis cache)')
bullet('Check redisCache.endpoint in OSGi config is reachable')
bullet('Check if country cookie name changed in a recent SAML update')

h2('Bug: Page CSS is broken / DDS components not styled')
p('Cause: Clientlib not loading, or clientlib category name mismatch.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('View page source → check if clientlib <link> and <script> tags are present')
bullet('In AEM Author: Tools → Operations → Web Console → Sling → Clientlib Manager → rebuild')
bullet('Check css.txt and js.txt — missing file entry = file not included')
bullet('Check clientlib .content.xml — categories property must match what .html template calls')
p('Quick fix: http://localhost:4502/libs/granite/ui/content/dumplibs.rebuild.html to force a rebuild.')

h2('Bug: Author dialog not saving / values not appearing on page')
p('Cause: Property name mismatch between dialog .content.xml and HTL template or Sling Model.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('In CRXDE Lite (/crx/de), navigate to the component node on the page → check stored property names')
bullet('Compare with _cq_dialog/.content.xml → find the "name" attribute of the dialog field (e.g. ./myProperty)')
bullet('Compare with HTL: ${properties.myProperty} or Sling Model @Inject field name')

h2('Bug: SAML login redirects to wrong page or fails')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Check SAMLRedirectServlet — it logs the authorize URL sent to the user')
bullet('Verify samlDILogin.endpoint and samlDISPID in EndPointsServiceImpl.xml match Dell Identity registration')
bullet('Check samlValidate.endpoint — must be reachable from AEM server network')

h2('Bug: Voucher portal not generating vouchers')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Check VoucherRequestServlet logs in error.log')
bullet('Verify VoucherCredentialsServiceImpl.xml has current credentials')
bullet('Check oauthL7.url + oauthL7.clientID + oauthL7.secretKey are still valid (Layer7 token may have expired)')

from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Pt, RGBColor, Inches, Cm
from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
from docx.enum.table import WD_TABLE_ALIGNMENT
from docx.oxml.ns import qn
from docx.oxml import OxmlElement
import copy

doc = Document()

# ── Styles ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
styles = doc.styles

def set_heading_color(style_name, rgb):
    style = styles[style_name]
    style.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(*rgb)

set_heading_color('Heading 1', (0, 118, 206))   # Dell blue
set_heading_color('Heading 2', (0, 73, 131))
set_heading_color('Heading 3', (34, 34, 34))

normal = styles['Normal']
normal.font.name = 'Calibri'
normal.font.size = Pt(11)

# ── Page margins ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
section = doc.sections[0]
section.top_margin    = Cm(2)
section.bottom_margin = Cm(2)
section.left_margin   = Cm(2.5)
section.right_margin  = Cm(2.5)

# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def h1(text):
    doc.add_heading(text, level=1)

def h2(text):
    doc.add_heading(text, level=2)

def h3(text):
    doc.add_heading(text, level=3)

def p(text=''):
    doc.add_paragraph(text)

def bullet(text):
    doc.add_paragraph(text, style='List Bullet')

def code_block(text):
    para = doc.add_paragraph()
    para.paragraph_format.left_indent = Inches(0.3)
    run = para.add_run(text)
    run.font.name = 'Courier New'
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(30, 30, 30)
    # light grey shading
    pPr = para._p.get_or_add_pPr()
    shd = OxmlElement('w:shd')
    shd.set(qn('w:val'), 'clear')
    shd.set(qn('w:color'), 'auto')
    shd.set(qn('w:fill'), 'F2F2F2')
    pPr.append(shd)

def table(headers, rows, col_widths=None):
    tbl = doc.add_table(rows=1, cols=len(headers))
    tbl.style = 'Light List Accent 1'
    tbl.alignment = WD_TABLE_ALIGNMENT.LEFT
    hdr_cells = tbl.rows[0].cells
    for i, h in enumerate(headers):
        hdr_cells[i].text = h
        hdr_cells[i].paragraphs[0].runs[0].bold = True
    for row in rows:
        cells = tbl.add_row().cells
        for i, val in enumerate(row):
            cells[i].text = str(val)
    if col_widths:
        for row in tbl.rows:
            for i, cell in enumerate(row.cells):
                cell.width = Inches(col_widths[i])
    doc.add_paragraph()   # spacing after table

def divider():
    doc.add_paragraph('─' * 80)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TITLE PAGE
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

run.font.size = Pt(24)

h3('Architecture')
code_block(
    'Browser\n'

    '        │     └── builds query from URL params + filters\n'
    '        ├── renderResults()  ◄─────────────────\n'
    '        │     └── DOMPurify sanitises HTML before inject\n'
    '        ├── Autocomplete (debounced 300ms, min 2 chars)\n'
    '        │     └── Coveo querySuggest endpoint\n'
    '        ├── Filters: Category, Modality, Price range\n'
    '        │     └── each filter change → updateURL() → init()\n'
    '        ├── Pagination (pageSize = 12)\n'
    '        └── Analytics: logSearch() / logClickEvent()'

h3('CourseDetailsModel.java — Primary SSR Model')

p('Lifecycle:')
bullet('@PostConstruct runs on model creation')
bullet('parseCourseAndMod() reads URL parameters courseID and mod')

bullet('Builds CoursePayload (courseId, deliveryType, country, audienceType)')
bullet('Calls CourseApiClient.getOfferingsAndCourseInfo(payload) → CourseInfoResponse')
bullet('Processes response → schedule JSON, HTML description sections, pricing fields')
bullet('Sets success = true on success, false on any exception')

h3('URL Parameter Handling — parseCourseAndMod()')
code_block(
    'Normal:        ?courseID=ESC12345&mod=Classroom\n'
    'Broken form 1: courseID contains "&mod=Classroom" → split on "&mod="\n'
    'Broken form 2: courseID contains "?mod=Classroom" → split on "?mod="\n'
    'Fallback:      missing param → default empty string'
)

# 6. END-TO-END DATA FLOW
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
h1('6. End-to-End Data Flow')

h2('6.1  Course Details Page Load')
code_block(
    'Browser GET /content/dell/en-us/home/course.html?courseID=ESC12345&mod=Classroom\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'AEM Sling → resolves → course-details-updated component\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'CourseDetailsModel.java (@PostConstruct)\n'
    '    ├── parseCourseAndMod()       → courseId="ESC12345", mod="Classroom"\n'
    '    ├── EdSvcUserInfo             → country="US", userId="user@dell.com"\n'
    '    ├── CourseApiClient.getOfferingsAndCourseInfo(payload)\n'
    '    │       └── HTTP POST → https://course-aggregatorstg.../getOfferingsAndCourseInfo\n'
    '    │                         ▼\n'
    '    │                   CourseInfoResponse JSON\n'
    '    ├── → scheduleTableDataJson   (JSON array of sessions)\n'
    '    ├── → blueprintBeforeScheduleHtml / blueprintAfterScheduleHtml\n'
    '    ├── → outlineHtml\n'
    '    └── success = true\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'course-details-updated.html (HTL rendered)\n'
    '    ├── <script id="dds__courseinfo-json">  ← full API JSON embedded\n'
    '    ├── <script id="schedule-data">          ← schedule rows JSON\n'
    '    ├── Hero banner, Sticky card, Tab panel\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'Browser executes clientlib JS\n'
    '    ├── Reads #dds__courseinfo-json → validates/enhances UI\n'
    '    ├── Reads #schedule-data → renders DDS table rows\n'
    '    ├── Reads window.courseModType → shows/hides schedule\n'
    '    ├── Checks session cookie → toggles Guest/User CTA buttons\n'
    '    └── DDS component init (tabs, tooltip, modal, loading-indicator)'
)

h2('6.2  Coveo Search Flow')
code_block(
    'Browser GET /search?q=cloud+networking&category=Networking\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'coveosearch.html (static shell rendered)\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'coveosearch.js DOMContentLoaded\n'
    '    ├── init()\n'
    '    │     ├── reads URL params → builds Coveo REST query\n'
    '    │     ├── POST https://apigtwobnp.us.dell.com/.../rest/search/v2\n'
    '    │     └── on response → renderResults() → DOMPurify → inject HTML\n'
    '    ├── Autocomplete: GET .../querySuggest (debounced 300ms)\n'
    '    ├── Filter change → updateURL() → init() re-runs\n'
    '    └── Coveo analytics: logSearch() / logClickEvent()'
)

h2('6.3  Authentication Flow (SAML)')
code_block(
    'User clicks Sign In\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'SAMLRedirectServlet → redirects to Dell Identity authorize endpoint\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'Dell Identity login page → user authenticates\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'SAMLCallbackServlet receives SAML assertion\n'
    '    ├── ParseSAMLService validates assertion signature\n'
    '    ├── Decrypts with samlEncrypt.endpoint\n'
    '    ├── Calls redisCache.endpoint/getUserInfo/ → full user profile\n'
    '    └── Sets session cookies → user is logged in\n'
    '    │\n'
    '    ▼\n'
    'Browser redirected → .dds__button-CTA-CD-User now visible'
)

p('All components use jQuery.noConflict() and assign to $jq to prevent conflicts with AEM\'s own jQuery:')
code_block('var $jq = jQuery.noConflict();')

h2('DDS Component Initialisation')
p('DDS components must be explicitly initialised in JavaScript. The data-dds attribute marks elements:')
code_block(
    'const element = document.getElementById("my-element");\n'
    'const api = DDS.ComponentName(element);\n'
    'api.show();  // or .hide(), .open(), .close()'
)

h2('Clientlib Categories')
p('AEM\'s clientlib.html template includes them in the HTL component:')
code_block("<sly data-sly-call=\"${clientLib.all @ categories='coursedetailsupdated.site'}\" />")
p('To add a new JS or CSS file: add the filename to js.txt or css.txt in the clientlib folder.')

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 10. COMMON BUGS & HOW TO FIX THEM
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
h1('10. Common Bugs & How to Fix Them')

h2('Bug: Course details page shows "Sorry, something went wrong"')
p('Cause: model.success == false — the CourseDetailsModel caught an exception.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Check AEM error.log → search for "CourseDetailsModel"')
bullet('Check URL parameters: must have both ?courseID=XXX&mod=YYY')
bullet('Test Store API directly: POST to storeApi.endpoint/CashMicroServices/catalog/getOfferingsAndCourseInfo')
bullet('Verify EndPointsServiceImpl config has correct storeApi.endpoint for the environment')
h3('Common Root Causes')
bullet('Store API is down or returning non-200')
bullet('courseID parameter is missing or malformed')
bullet('SSL certificate issue in RESTClientImpl')
bullet('mod value not matching expected values (case-sensitive: "Classroom" not "classroom")')

h2('Bug: Schedule table is empty but API returns data')
p('Cause: model.scheduleTableDataJson is "[]" or JS failed to parse/render the table.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Right-click page → View Source → find <script id="schedule-data"> → check JSON value')
bullet('If JSON is empty: problem in CourseDetailsModel.java offerings processing')
bullet('If JSON has data: problem in clientlib JS → open browser console for errors')
h3('Common Root Causes')
bullet('window.courseModType causes schedule section to be hidden (isOtherMod() returns true)')
bullet('Country/location filter removes all offerings before rendering')
bullet('model.offerings.size() check incorrectly shows "No schedule" message')

h2('Bug: "Add to Cart" button is never visible')
p('Cause: JS that toggles .dds__button-CTA-CD-User is not running correctly.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Open browser console — look for JS errors in the clientlib')
bullet('Check RetrieveHeaderVariablesServlet returns correct session data')
bullet('Check cookie names — if cookie name changed in EdSvcUserInfo, the JS check fails')
p('Fix: The toggle logic reads from the session cookie set by SAMLCallbackServlet. If authentication changed (new cookie name), update the coursedetails clientlib JS to match.')

h2('Bug: Coveo search returns no results')
p('Cause: API key expired, endpoint changed, or Coveo org ID mismatch.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Open browser DevTools → Network tab → find the Coveo API call')
bullet('401 Unauthorized → API key expired → update coveo.apiKey in EndPointsServiceImpl.xml')
bullet('403 Forbidden → wrong org ID or SearchHub → check Coveo admin console')
bullet('200 but empty results → query issue, check filter state and URL params')

h2('Bug: Autocomplete dropdown not appearing')
p('Cause: Coveo querySuggest call failing, or input is less than 2 characters.')
p('Fix location: coveosearch.js — AUTOCOMPLETE_DELAY (300ms) and MIN_CHARS_AUTOCOMPLETE (2) constants near top of file.')

h2('Bug: User\'s country shows wrong location in schedule')
p('Cause: model.useLocation is returning wrong country.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Check EdSvcUserInfo.java — where it reads country (cookie vs Redis cache)')
bullet('Check redisCache.endpoint in OSGi config is reachable')
bullet('Check if country cookie name changed in a recent SAML update')

h2('Bug: Page CSS is broken / DDS components not styled')
p('Cause: Clientlib not loading, or clientlib category name mismatch.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('View page source → check if clientlib <link> and <script> tags are present')
bullet('In AEM Author: Tools → Operations → Web Console → Sling → Clientlib Manager → rebuild')
bullet('Check css.txt and js.txt — missing file entry = file not included')
bullet('Check clientlib .content.xml — categories property must match what .html template calls')
p('Quick fix: http://localhost:4502/libs/granite/ui/content/dumplibs.rebuild.html to force a rebuild.')

h2('Bug: Author dialog not saving / values not appearing on page')
p('Cause: Property name mismatch between dialog .content.xml and HTL template or Sling Model.')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('In CRXDE Lite (/crx/de), navigate to the component node on the page → check stored property names')
bullet('Compare with _cq_dialog/.content.xml → find the "name" attribute of the dialog field (e.g. ./myProperty)')
bullet('Compare with HTL: ${properties.myProperty} or Sling Model @Inject field name')

h2('Bug: SAML login redirects to wrong page or fails')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Check SAMLRedirectServlet — it logs the authorize URL sent to the user')
bullet('Verify samlDILogin.endpoint and samlDISPID in EndPointsServiceImpl.xml match Dell Identity registration')
bullet('Check samlValidate.endpoint — must be reachable from AEM server network')

h2('Bug: Voucher portal not generating vouchers')
h3('How to Diagnose')
bullet('Check VoucherRequestServlet logs in error.log')
bullet('Verify VoucherCredentialsServiceImpl.xml has current credentials')
bullet('Check oauthL7.url + oauthL7.clientID + oauthL7.secretKey are still valid (Layer7 token may have expired)')

Good to know — here's a clear breakdown of the project so you understand what's what:

---

## This project has BOTH frontend AND backend

### Frontend — `ui.apps/`
- **HTL templates** (`.html` files) — the page markup
- **JavaScript** (`.js` clientlib files) — page interactions, API calls, search logic
- **CSS** (`.css` clientlib files) — styling using Dell Design System (DDS)
- **Author dialogs** (`_cq_dialog/.content.xml`) — what authors see in AEM edit mode

You can edit these without running a Java build. Just package and deploy `ui.apps`.

---

### Backend — `core/` (Java)
- **Sling Models** — Java classes that feed data into the HTML templates (e.g. `CourseDetailsModel.java` fetches course info from the API and passes it to the `.html` file via `${model.xxx}`)
- **Servlets** — Java HTTP endpoints called by the browser JS (e.g. `/eduservice/search`)
- **Services** — Business logic (authentication, REST calls to Coveo, Saba, Store API)
- **OSGi Configs** — `ui.config/` — environment URLs and credentials

Changing these requires a full `mvn clean install` Java build.

---

### How they connect
```
User's browser
    ↓
HTL template (.html)  ←── Sling Model (Java) ←── External APIs
    ↓
clientlib JS (.js) ←─── calls Servlets (Java) ←── External APIs
```

Your current uncommitted changes (`course-details-updated.html` and `coveosearch.js`) are **both frontend only** — no Java needed for those.

---

Got it — noted and saved. Here's a practical learning path for this specific project:

---

## How to Go from New → Pro on This Project

### Step 1 — Understand the page render cycle (most important)
Pick one page (e.g. a course detail page) and trace it top to bottom:
1. What URL loads it?
2. Which component is on that page? (check CRXDE: `/crx/de` → find the page node)
3. Which `.html` template renders it?
4. Which Java model feeds it (`data-sly-use.model="..."`)
5. What does that Java model call to get data?

Once you can trace that loop for one page, you can debug **any** page.

---

### Step 2 — Learn the 3 files that matter most for every component

| File | What it does | Where to look |
|---|---|---|
| `<component>.html` | Markup + data binding | ui.apps/.../custom-components/ |
| `<component>.js` (clientlib) | Page behaviour + API calls | same folder, clientlib-*/js/ |
| `*Model.java` or `*Use.java` | Server-side data preparation | core/.../models/ or use/ |

Your current changes (`course-details-updated.html` and `coveosearch.js`) are a perfect starting point — you're already touching the right files.

---

### Step 3 — Read the files that are open in your IDE right now

You just opened `GetCoursesServlet.java` — that's one of the Java endpoints called by the frontend. A good exercise: find where in `coveosearch.js` or another JS file it calls `/eduservice/getcourses`, then follow the response back to how it renders on screen.

---

### Step 4 — Use me as your explainer

Any time you see code you don't understand, paste it here and ask "what does this do and why?" I'll explain it in context of **this project's** specific flow, not generic theory.

---

The documentation you now have (`AEM_Developer_Documentation.docx`) is your map. Use it to orient yourself, then dive into the actual files to learn the details. What would you like to dig into first?
